recommendations.title: The Seventh Company Outdoors
recommendations.overview: The third part of Seventh Company adventures.

recommendations.title: Boruto: Naruto the Movie
recommendations.overview: The spirited Boruto Uzumaki, son of Seventh Hokage Naruto, is a skilled ninja who possesses the same brashness and passion his father once had. However, the constant absence of his father, who is busy with his Hokage duties, puts a damper on Boruto's

recommendations.title: The Seventh Company Has Been Found
recommendations.overview: The second part of the Seventh Company adventures.

recommendations.title: Bionicle: Mask of Light
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: With darkness encroaching on the island of Mata Nui, the only hope for the survival of the islanders rests with two Matoran villagers, who must find the seventh Toa and deliver to him the fabled Mask of Light.

recommendations.title: Star Kid
recommendations.overview: Shy seventh-grader Spencer Griffith's life changes when the meteor falls into local junkyard and he finds a Cybersuit - the wise and strong robot from another galaxy. Spencer puts Cybersuit on and becomes a different kind of guy

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: The Care Bears Movie
recommendations.overview: The Care Bears team up with a troubled brother and sister who just moved to a new town to help a neglected young magician's apprentice whose evil spell book causes sinister things to happen.

recommendations.title: Hocus Pocus
recommendations.overview: After 300 years of slumber, three sister witches are accidentally resurrected in Salem on Halloween night, and it is up to three kids and their newfound feline friend to put an end to the witches' reign of terror once and for all.

recommendations.title: Code 3
recommendations.overview: A burned-out paramedic tries to survive his last 24 hours on the job while training a new recruit.

recommendations.title: Underdog
recommendations.genres: Family, Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A lab accident gives a beagle named Shoeshine some serious superpowers -- a secret that the dog eventually shares with the young boy who becomes his owner and friend.
